positive: Minimalist geometric abstract pattern featuring interlocking constellations and celestial bodies, rendered in deep sapphire blue, rich gold foil, and matte cream. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, designed as a seamless textile repeat pattern. Focus on clean, crisp lines and strong contrast, achieving a luxurious yet modern aesthetic suitable for t-shirt printing. Use a starry night sky backdrop combined with stylized, geometric star charts and crescent moons. Overhead studio lighting for perfect visibility of edges. Vector illustration style, high detail, print-ready for apparel.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, bad composition, sloppy lines, noise, extra limbs, malformed anatomy, logo, brand, celebrity
